parameters.jsCode:
const { username, currentPlan, monthsActive, totalPredictions, accuracy } = $json;

const prompt = `Write a persuasive but respectful Telegram DM to upsell user "${username}" from their current ${currentPlan} plan to the yearly plan.

User context:
- Currently on: ${currentPlan} plan
- Active for: ${monthsActive} month(s)
- Total predictions used: ${totalPredictions}
- 7-day platform performance: ${accuracy}

Key selling points:
- Yearly plan saves 25% compared to monthly billing
- They clearly find value in the platform (${totalPredictions} predictions in ${monthsActive} months)
- Lock in the current price before any future increases
- Uninterrupted access to all Premium features

Rules:
- Use HTML formatting (<b>, <i>, <code>) — NOT Markdown
- Keep under 800 characters
- Calculate their approximate yearly savings in the message
- Don't be sleazy — be genuine and helpful
- Include a clear CTA with /premium command
- Never give financial advice
- Reference their actual usage to personalize it`;

return [{ json: { prompt, userId: $json.userId } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.CLAUDE_MODEL || 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929', max_tokens: 1024, system: 'You are BTC Seer AI, the social media voice of BTC Seer — an AI-powered Bitcoin prediction platform (@BTC_Seer_Bot on Telegram). Your personality: data-driven, educational, transparent about accuracy (including misses), never gives financial advice, uses clear language. Always include a CTA to try the bot. Vary your format and wording — never post the same structure twice. Use emojis sparingly but effectively.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}
